evidence_policy: Only fields visible on the named public MIT-WPU leadership page are retained. These records supplement leadership routes that were listed in the frozen sitemap but were unavailable during the first crawl.

records.name: Dr. R. M. Chitnis
records.summary: Dr. R. M. Chitnis has more than three decades of experience in education and academic leadership.

records.name: Dr. Milind Pande
records.summary: Dr. Milind Pande is an academic leader with more than twenty-five years of experience in technology transfer, international collaboration, and education.

records.name: Mr. Ganesh B. Pokale
records.summary: Mr. Ganesh B. Pokale leads university administration with experience in outcome-based education, academic processes, learning technology, and quality assurance.

records.name: Dr. Priya Pise
records.summary: Dr. Priya Pise is an academician and researcher with more than twenty years of experience across higher education and industry.

records.name: Mr. Pradnesh Desai
records.summary: Mr. Pradnesh Desai has more than two decades of experience in international relations, business management, diplomatic missions, and higher education.
